title: Jubilate Agno: Fragment A by Christopher Smart — Love Poetry Lines
content:
Rejoice in God, O ye Tongues; give the glory to the Lord, and the Lamb.

Nations, and languages, and every Creature, in which is the breath of Life.

Let man and beast appear before him, and magnify his name together.

Let Noah and his company approach the throne of Grace, and do homage to the Ark of their Salvation.
meaning: "Jubilate Agno: Fragment A" by Christopher Smart is a love and deep and nature and inspirational poem consisting of 225 lines. The poet explores themes of love and deep and nature and inspirational through vivid imagery and emotional depth. Beginning with "Rejoice in God, O ye Tongues; give the glory to the Lord, and the Lamb. ...", this piece captures the essence of human experience and invites reflection on the deeper currents of life and feeling. This work is part of Christopher Smart's celebrated body of poetry that continues to resonate with readers worldwide.
